ciliary_role: Role in regulation of  scent disc formation in photoreceptor cilium, by regulating actin-mediated membrane extension. Absence of RPGR impaired ciliogenesis and cell attachment (21933838). Mutations cause type 3 retinis pigmentosa (8673101). RPGR is suggested to regulate cilia function and facilitate the trafficking of proteins along the photoreceptor cilium. Interacts withciliary proteins, such as RPGRIP1, IQCB1, CEP290 and RPGRIP1L, as well as Rab8a (20631154).
